text:
On 19 May 2012 18:10, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/php5-rrdtool,
>
> Please note that PR ports/168138 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/168138

I approve my own submit :-). I knew I should have updated my mail
address in the Makefile a while a ago ;-).

Br. /Rick
